title: Augustana Alumnus Recognized for Decades of Service With 2026 Augie Pride Award
summary_en: Donovan DeJong ‘93 has been named the 2026 Augie Pride Award winner. He was recognized on Wednesday, April 29, at the university’s annual Service Awards & Retirement Recognition Ceremony in the Ordal Dining Hall of Morrison Commons. Since 1999, the Augie Pride Award has been given to employees who go the extra mile to provide exceptional service to the university.
title_cn: 奥古斯塔纳大学校友唐诺文·德容获颁2026年“奥吉骄傲奖”
summary_cn: 2026年“奥吉骄傲奖”获奖者于近日公布，奥古斯塔纳大学1993届校友、现任信息技术部副主任唐诺文·德容获此殊荣。颁奖仪式于4月29日在该校莫里森公共餐厅举行的年度服务奖与退休人员表彰典礼上进行。该奖项自1999年设立以来，旨在表彰那些超越本职要求、为大学提供卓越服务的教职员工。
